vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BEL Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download BEL Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEL Senior Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the BEL Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis posts is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./ B.Tech./ B. Sc. Engineering degree in ECE/ EE/ ME/ Instrumentation to be eligible for the Senior Engineer (E-III) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Engineer (E-III) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for Ex-Servicemen and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the BEL Senior Engineer position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month, with a 3% increment.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. However, General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 400/- plus 18% GST.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Panchkula, Haryana, with the pincode 134113.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 2026-27/06/PK/SE_FT/006.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job, with the post being "Senior Engineer (E-III) on Fixed Tenure Basis".
